Product Catalog

.product-image { width: 100%; height: 160px; border-radius: 16px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.04); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 16px; } .product-image i { font-size: 48px; color: var(--text-secondary); } .product-name { font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 4px; } .product-price { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--primary); } .product-category { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 12px; } .product-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-top: 12px; }
